title: polyscias angustifolia
intro: Polyscias angustifolia, also known as the dwarf neem or narrow-leaved polyscias, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Africa and the Pacific Islands. The leaves and roots of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Polyscias angustifolia include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Polyscias angustifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
